channel.title: Text Analysis on KPress R Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Text Analysis on KPress R Blog

item.title: I Want To Believe
item.description: This is a test paragraph paragraph paragraph.The site has been served under the directory “/Users/katienachman/Desktop/blog”. I have tried to reopen it for you with servr::browse_last(). If you do want to start a new server, you may stop existing servers with blogdown::stop_server(), or restart R. Normally you should not need to serve the. head(ep_text) {"columns":[{"label":["source"],"name":[1],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["title"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["text"],"name":[3],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["speaker"],"name":[4],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["line"],"name":[5],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["season"],"name":[6],"type":["fctr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["no_overall"],"name":[7],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["no_inseason"],"name":[8],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["directed_by"],"name":[9],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["written_by"],"name":[10],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["original_air_date"],"name":[11],"type":["date"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["prod_code"],"name":[12],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["no_viewers"],"name":[13],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["rating"],"name":[14],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["description"],"name":[15],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["full_title"],"name":[16],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"1","2":"PILOT","3":"JOHN TRUITT: I put the time of death between eight and twelve hours ago. No visible cause"

item.title: The Truth is Out There Part II
item.description: In the last “episode” I created a dataset of X-Files episodes using web scraping. The simple episode descriptions are not going to give me the depth of information I need for a real text analysis, so it’s time to get some more data! Many of the X-Files episode transcripts are available online, so I found a website I could use to scrape most of the text I need. First, I’m going to create a list of episode links that I can use to download the transcripts.

item.title: The Truth is Out There
item.description: I’m a huge X-Files fan. I also love working with text data. I’ve had an idea floating around for a while to do a text analysis on X-Files episode scripts - the first 9 seasons are easy to find online. First, I want to get some basic information about the episodes, so that’s what this post will focus on. My first thought was to go to Wikipedia.
